final:
module mux2to1_32bit (
    input sel,
    input [31:0] in0,
    input [31:0] in1,
    output [31:0] out
);

    reg [31:0] mux_out;  // Multiplexer output register

    always @(*) begin
        case (sel)
            1'b0: mux_out = in0;
            1'b1: mux_out = in1;
            default: mux_out = 32'b0;  // Default case (should not occur)
        endcase
    end

    assign out = mux_out;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (sel == 1'b0) begin
        mux_out <= in1;
      end else if (sel == 1'b1) begin
        mux_out <= in0;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
